query: SELECT opl.categoriaId, oc.nome as categoria, COUNT(*) as qtd_linhas, SUM(opl.totalAnual) as total_anual FROM orcamento_planejado_linhas opl JOIN orcamento_categorias oc ON opl.categoriaId = oc.id WHERE opl.versaoId = 1 GROUP BY opl.categoriaId, oc.nome ORDER BY total_anual DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4X2C2Km2DVLwNTk.c1886cf7bd86 --database GdPAuRogRcNPzV7ENB2n8s --execute SELECT opl.categoriaId, oc.nome as categoria, COUNT(*) as qtd_linhas, SUM(opl.totalAnual) as total_anual FROM orcamento_planejado_linhas opl JOIN orcamento_categorias oc ON opl.categoriaId = oc.id WHERE opl.versaoId = 1 GROUP BY opl.categoriaId, oc.nome ORDER BY total_anual DESC;
